description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 58-61.

Level 22

Two Extra Attacks

Beginning at 22nd level, you can attack three times when you take the Attack action on your turn.

Greater Awareness

Also at 22nd level, you have a +5 bonus to your Initiative rolls, and you cannot be surprised while conscious. You can use the Search action as a bonus action on your turn.

Slayer’s Mark

Also at 22nd level, you learn to tag your quarry with a deadly mark. As a bonus action, you can expend 1 Legendary Point to hone your senses on a creature within 500 feet. Your critical range against that creature is increased by 1 and you have advantage on attack rolls against it. You always know the creature’s location while in the same plane of existence as you. The mark remains for 8 hours, or until you mark another creature.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
